'''âs-zh-sh''' ('''kasazhash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:imbarn|imbarn]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-zh-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:imbarn|imbarn]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-zh-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kasazhash
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisazhash|thisazhash]] || [[word:jisazhash|jisazhash]] || [[word:shisazhash|shisazhash]] || [[word:kisazhash|kisazhash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusazhash|thuthusazhash]] || [[word:jujusazhash|jujusazhash]] || [[word:shushusazhash|shushusazhash]] || [[word:kukusazhash|kukusazhash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusazhash|thusazhash]] || [[word:jusazhash|jusazhash]] || [[word:shusazhash|shusazhash]] || [[word:kusazhash|kusazhash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusazhash|thusazhash]] || [[word:jusazhash|jusazhash]] || [[word:shusazhash|shusazhash]] || [[word:kusazhash|kusazhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesazhash|thesazhash]] || [[word:jesazhash|jesazhash]] || [[word:shesazhash|shesazhash]] || [[word:kesazhash|kesazhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosazhash|thothosazhash]] || [[word:jojosazhash|jojosazhash]] || [[word:shoshosazhash|shoshosazhash]] || [[word:kokosazhash|kokosazhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosazhash|thosazhash]] || [[word:josazhash|josazhash]] || [[word:shosazhash|shosazhash]] || [[word:kosazhash|kosazhash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosazhash|thosazhash]] || [[word:josazhash|josazhash]] || [[word:shosazhash|shosazhash]] || [[word:kosazhash|kosazhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsazhash|thĂŠsazhash]] || [[word:jĂŠsazhash|jĂŠsazhash]] || [[word:shĂŠsazhash|shĂŠsazhash]] || [[word:kĂŠsazhash|kĂŠsazhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasazhash|thathasazhash]] || [[word:jajasazhash|jajasazhash]] || [[word:shashasazhash|shashasazhash]] || [[word:kakasazhash|kakasazhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasazhash|thasazhash]] || [[word:jasazhash|jasazhash]] || [[word:shasazhash|shasazhash]] || [[word:kasazhash|kasazhash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasazhash|thasazhash]] || [[word:jasazhash|jasazhash]] || [[word:shasazhash|shasazhash]] || [[word:kasazhash|kasazhash]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasazhash|shasazhash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasazhash|goshasazhash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasazhash|gokishasazhash]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasazhashnĂŒ|shasazhashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasazhashnknĂŒ|goshasazhashnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazhashnĂŒ|gokishasazhashnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasazhashĂ«|shasazhashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkshĂ«|goshasazhashnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasazhashĂ«|gokishasazhashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazhashro|shasazhashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkro|goshasazhashnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazhashro|gokishasazhashro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazhashmu|shasazhashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkmu|goshasazhashnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazhashmu|gokishasazhashmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasazhasher|shasazhasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasazhashnksher|goshasazhashnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasazhasher|gokishasazhasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasazhashng|shasazhashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkng|goshasazhashnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasazhashng|gokishasazhashng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasazhashya|shasazhashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkya|goshasazhashnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasazhashya|gokishasazhashya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasazhashyam|shasazhashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkyam|goshasazhashnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasazhashyam|gokishasazhashyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazhashnĂŒshĂ«|shasazhashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazhashnknĂŒshĂ«|goshasazhashnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazhashnĂŒshĂ«|gokishasazhashnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazhashnĂŒro|shasazhashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazhashnknĂŒro|goshasazhashnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazhashnĂŒro|gokishasazhashnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazhashnĂŒmu|shasazhashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazhashnknĂŒmu|goshasazhashnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazhashnĂŒmu|gokishasazhashnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazhashĂ«nĂŒ|shasazhashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasazhashnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazhashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasazhashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazhashĂ«ro|shasazhashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkshĂ«ro|goshasazhashnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazhashĂ«ro|gokishasazhashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazhashĂ«mu|shasazhashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkshĂ«mu|goshasazhashnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazhashĂ«mu|gokishasazhashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazhashronĂŒ|shasazhashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkronĂŒ|goshasazhashnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazhashronĂŒ|gokishasazhashronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazhashroshĂ«|shasazhashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkroshĂ«|goshasazhashnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazhashroshĂ«|gokishasazhashroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasazhashromu|shasazhashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkromu|goshasazhashnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasazhashromu|gokishasazhashromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasazhashmunĂŒ|shasazhashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkmunĂŒ|goshasazhashnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasazhashmunĂŒ|gokishasazhashmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasazhashmushĂ«|shasazhashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkmushĂ«|goshasazhashnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasazhashmushĂ«|gokishasazhashmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasazhashmuro|shasazhashmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasazhashnkmuro|goshasazhashnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasazhashmuro|gokishasazhashmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
